messages.content: Meeting room opened. Sector HIGH_142 is projected to exceed capacity in 18 minutes.
HIGH_142 hits 118% capacity in 18 minutes. 21 flights against a capacity of 18, three over.
A convective line is blocking the eastern corridor with echo tops at 44,000 ft and reflectivity up to 52 dBZ.
If unmitigated, arrival banks at ORD and EWR inherit roughly 247 minutes of delay, and HIGH_144 pressure rises next.
8 similar scenarios on record. A western reroute worked 83% of the time in the mocked precedent file.

briefing.headline: Sector HIGH_142 projected to exceed capacity in 18 minutes.
briefing.summary: Convective weather is blocking the eastern corridor and pushing 22 flights into a single high-altitude sector.

recommendations.title: Meter or Reroute Westbound Flow
recommendations.summary: Meter westbound flow before the HIGH_142 peak and route via the western corridor.
recommendations.expected_impact: Relieves HIGH_142 to ~96% capacity; ~21% delay reduction.
risks: Shifts capacity burden to adjacent sector HIGH_144.

support: Air Marshal and Weather Boy agree on cause
